error_message: Cannot read property 'customerId' of null
stack_trace:
at processCustomerData (index.js:45:12)
at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
at main (index.js:30:8)
resolution: Added null check before accessing customer properties: if (customer && customer.customerId)
fix_description: Implemented defensive programming with null checks

error_message: Failed to connect to database server at db.example.com:5432
resolution: Updated connection string with correct credentials and added connection retry logic with exponential backoff
fix_description: Fixed credentials and implemented retry mechanism

error_message: Database query timeout after 30 seconds
resolution: Optimized query with proper indexing on customer_id and created_date columns, reduced execution time from 35s to 2s
fix_description: Added database indexes and query optimization

error_message: SMTP authentication failed: Invalid credentials
resolution: Updated SMTP credentials in environment variables and enabled app-specific password for Gmail
fix_description: Configured proper SMTP authentication

error_message: Invalid email format in customer record
resolution: Added email validation regex and skip invalid records with logging: /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/
fix_description: Implemented email validation with proper regex

error_message: Could not acquire lock on table 'customers' - timeout after 60 seconds
resolution: Changed cleanup job schedule to run during off-peak hours (2 AM) and reduced lock timeout to 30s with retry
fix_description: Rescheduled job and optimized locking strategy

error_message: API rate limit exceeded: 1000 requests per hour
resolution: Implemented request throttling with queue system and added caching for frequently accessed data
fix_description: Added rate limiting and caching mechanism

error_message: Insufficient disk space: 50MB required, 10MB available
resolution: Implemented automatic cleanup of old temporary files and added disk space monitoring with alerts
fix_description: Added cleanup automation and monitoring

error_message: Out of memory: Cannot allocate 500MB for data processing
resolution: Implemented streaming processing instead of loading entire dataset into memory, reduced memory usage by 80%
fix_description: Converted to streaming architecture

error_message: Template variable 'customer_name' is undefined
resolution: Added default values for all template variables and improved error handling with fallback templates
fix_description: Implemented template variable validation

error_message: Deadlock detected: Transaction rolled back
resolution: Implemented transaction ordering and added deadlock retry logic with exponential backoff
fix_description: Optimized transaction handling

error_message: Network timeout: Failed to reach SMTP server after 30 seconds
resolution: Increased network timeout to 60 seconds and added connection pooling for better reliability
fix_description: Improved network resilience

error_message: UnicodeDecodeError: 'utf-8' codec can't decode byte 0xff
resolution: Added automatic encoding detection and fallback to latin-1 encoding for legacy files
fix_description: Implemented multi-encoding support

error_message: Unexpected token < in JSON at position 0
resolution: Added response validation and proper error handling for non-JSON responses from API
fix_description: Enhanced response validation

error_message: Foreign key constraint violation: Cannot delete parent row
resolution: Modified cleanup logic to delete child records first, then parent records in correct order
fix_description: Fixed deletion order

error_message: CSV schema mismatch due to missing required columns: phone, status, created_date
stack_trace:

fix_description: Implemented flexible schema validation with defaults

error_message: Input records contain malformed field values - invalid email, date, phone, and status formats

impact: Job fails when parsing invalid email, phone, date, or status values
